business_purpose: Identify repeated below-threshold outbound transfers designed to avoid currency transaction reporting thresholds.
detection_logic: Multiple outbound transfers below the reporting threshold are grouped by account inside a rolling 24-hour window by default. Candidate evidence is retained when the count threshold is met.

evidence.description: Transaction IDs for below-threshold transfers inside the detection window.

example_scenario: An account sends eight 9,500 USD transfers to external counterparties within 24 hours.

limitations.mitigation: Tune thresholds by market, product, and local reporting obligation.

limitations.limitation: Cash deposits and transfers may need different thresholds in a real system.
limitations.mitigation: Split typology variants or add channel-specific parameters later.

limitations.limitation: Synthetic data may produce cleaner patterns than production banking data.
limitations.mitigation: Validate against noisy production-like backtests before deployment.

operational_notes: Review account type and expected cash activity before analyst escalation.
Repeated false positives should feed jurisdiction-specific threshold tuning.
scoring_logic: Use the base rule score unless the transfer count reaches the configured high-count multiplier, then use the high-count score.

thresholds.name: reporting_threshold
thresholds.rationale: Upper reporting amount. controls deterministic candidate selection or scoring.
thresholds.tuning_guidance: Tune using historical alert review, scenario fixtures, and false-positive analysis.

thresholds.name: below_threshold_margin
thresholds.rationale: Below-threshold band. controls deterministic candidate selection or scoring.
thresholds.tuning_guidance: Tune using historical alert review, scenario fixtures, and false-positive analysis.

thresholds.name: min_transaction_count
thresholds.rationale: Minimum transfers. controls deterministic candidate selection or scoring.
thresholds.tuning_guidance: Tune using historical alert review, scenario fixtures, and false-positive analysis.

thresholds.name: window_hours
thresholds.rationale: Rolling detection window. controls deterministic candidate selection or scoring.
thresholds.tuning_guidance: Tune using historical alert review, scenario fixtures, and false-positive analysis.

thresholds.name: transaction_types
thresholds.rationale: Eligible transaction types. controls deterministic candidate selection or scoring.
thresholds.tuning_guidance: Tune using historical alert review, scenario fixtures, and false-positive analysis.

thresholds.name: include_counterparty_payments
thresholds.rationale: Whether counterparty payments are candidates. controls deterministic candidate selection or scoring.
thresholds.tuning_guidance: Tune using historical alert review, scenario fixtures, and false-positive analysis.

thresholds.name: base_risk_score
thresholds.rationale: Standard alert score. controls deterministic candidate selection or scoring.
thresholds.tuning_guidance: Tune using historical alert review, scenario fixtures, and false-positive analysis.

thresholds.name: high_count_risk_score
thresholds.rationale: Elevated count score. controls deterministic candidate selection or scoring.
thresholds.tuning_guidance: Tune using historical alert review, scenario fixtures, and false-positive analysis.

thresholds.name: high_count_multiplier
thresholds.rationale: High-count multiplier. controls deterministic candidate selection or scoring.
thresholds.tuning_guidance: Tune using historical alert review, scenario fixtures, and false-positive analysis.

business_purpose: Identify collection accounts receiving funds from many unique senders.
detection_logic: Many unique sender accounts transfer into one receiving account within a rolling seven-day window by default.

evidence.description: Transaction IDs from sender accounts into the receiving account.
Unique sending account IDs used to support the sender-count threshold.

example_scenario: A receiving account collects transfers from 15 unrelated senders in 7 days.

limitations.limitation: High-volume merchant accounts may produce benign fan-in patterns.
limitations.mitigation: Incorporate merchant, charity, and platform-account segment context.

limitations.limitation: Customer segment and account type should be incorporated in later tuning.
limitations.mitigation: Use profile and feature tables for segment-aware suppression.

limitations.limitation: Duplicate senders should not inflate unique sender counts.
limitations.mitigation: Continue using canonical sender account IDs and identity resolution.

operational_notes: Compare sender geographies and customer relationships during review.
Monitor merchant-account false positives separately from personal accounts.
scoring_logic: Use the base score unless unique sender count reaches the configured multiplier, then use the high-sender score.

thresholds.name: min_unique_senders
thresholds.rationale: Minimum unique senders. controls deterministic candidate selection or scoring.
thresholds.tuning_guidance: Tune using historical alert review, scenario fixtures, and false-positive analysis.

thresholds.name: window_days
thresholds.rationale: Rolling detection window. controls deterministic candidate selection or scoring.
thresholds.tuning_guidance: Tune using historical alert review, scenario fixtures, and false-positive analysis.

thresholds.name: min_total_amount
thresholds.rationale: Minimum total received value. controls deterministic candidate selection or scoring.
thresholds.tuning_guidance: Tune using historical alert review, scenario fixtures, and false-positive analysis.

thresholds.name: transaction_types
thresholds.rationale: Eligible transaction types. controls deterministic candidate selection or scoring.
thresholds.tuning_guidance: Tune using historical alert review, scenario fixtures, and false-positive analysis.

thresholds.name: include_internal_account_receipts
thresholds.rationale: Whether internal account receipts qualify. controls deterministic candidate selection or scoring.
thresholds.tuning_guidance: Tune using historical alert review, scenario fixtures, and false-positive analysis.

thresholds.name: base_risk_score
thresholds.rationale: Standard alert score. controls deterministic candidate selection or scoring.
thresholds.tuning_guidance: Tune using historical alert review, scenario fixtures, and false-positive analysis.

thresholds.name: high_sender_risk_score
thresholds.rationale: Elevated sender score. controls deterministic candidate selection or scoring.
thresholds.tuning_guidance: Tune using historical alert review, scenario fixtures, and false-positive analysis.

thresholds.name: high_sender_multiplier
thresholds.rationale: High-sender multiplier. controls deterministic candidate selection or scoring.
thresholds.tuning_guidance: Tune using historical alert review, scenario fixtures, and false-positive analysis.

business_purpose: Identify dispersion accounts sending funds to many unique recipients.
detection_logic: One sending account transfers to many unique recipients within a rolling seven-day window by default.

evidence.description: Transaction IDs from sending account to distinct recipient accounts or counterparties.
Recipient keys derived from receiver account IDs or counterparty IDs.

example_scenario: A sending account distributes funds to 20 recipients over one week.

limitations.limitation: Payroll or marketplace payout accounts may produce benign fan-out patterns.
limitations.mitigation: Use account purpose and customer segment controls in later tuning.

limitations.limitation: Counterparty quality and customer segment should be reviewed in later versions.
limitations.mitigation: Join risk-rated counterparty and customer profile features when available.

limitations.limitation: Recipient identity resolution may affect unique recipient counts.
limitations.mitigation: Improve recipient entity resolution before production deployment.

operational_notes: Validate whether the account has expected payout or payroll activity.
Review recipient clustering and repeated recipient names where available.
scoring_logic: Use the base score unless unique recipient count reaches the configured multiplier, then use the high-recipient score.

thresholds.name: min_unique_recipients
thresholds.rationale: Minimum recipients. controls deterministic candidate selection or scoring.
thresholds.tuning_guidance: Tune using historical alert review, scenario fixtures, and false-positive analysis.

thresholds.rationale: Rolling detection window. controls deterministic candidate selection or scoring.
thresholds.tuning_guidance: Tune using historical alert review, scenario fixtures, and false-positive analysis.

thresholds.rationale: Minimum total sent value. controls deterministic candidate selection or scoring.
thresholds.tuning_guidance: Tune using historical alert review, scenario fixtures, and false-positive analysis.

thresholds.rationale: Include internal recipients. controls deterministic candidate selection or scoring.
thresholds.tuning_guidance: Tune using historical alert review, scenario fixtures, and false-positive analysis.

thresholds.name: base_risk_score
thresholds.rationale: Standard alert score. controls deterministic candidate selection or scoring.
thresholds.tuning_guidance: Tune using historical alert review, scenario fixtures, and false-positive analysis.

thresholds.name: high_recipient_risk_score
thresholds.rationale: Elevated recipient score. controls deterministic candidate selection or scoring.
thresholds.tuning_guidance: Tune using historical alert review, scenario fixtures, and false-positive analysis.

business_purpose: Identify pass-through accounts where incoming funds quickly leave the account.
detection_logic: Aggregate inbound value and outbound value inside a configurable outflow window, then flag high outflow ratio and low retained value.

evidence.description: Inbound transaction IDs inside the pass-through detection window.
Outbound transaction IDs following the inbound activity inside the same window.

example_alert.reason_code: 90 percent of received value sent out within 48 hours

example_scenario: An account receives 10,000 USD and sends out 9,200 USD within 48 hours.

limitations.limitation: Legitimate settlement accounts can have high pass-through ratios.
limitations.mitigation: Add product, account purpose, and customer segment context.

limitations.limitation: Balance data would improve retained-value interpretation.
limitations.mitigation: Incorporate balance snapshots or available-balance features later.

limitations.limitation: Time-zone and business-day handling should be reviewed before production use.
limitations.mitigation: Align timestamp handling to operational calendars and branch jurisdictions.

operational_notes: Review inbound source and outbound destination relationship before escalation.
Segment settlement-like accounts separately during threshold tuning.
reason_code_format: 90 percent of received value sent out within 48 hours
scoring_logic: Use the base score for standard detections and the high-ratio score when the outflow ratio reaches the configured high-ratio threshold.

thresholds.name: outflow_window_hours
thresholds.rationale: Pass-through window. controls deterministic candidate selection or scoring.
thresholds.tuning_guidance: Tune using historical alert review, scenario fixtures, and false-positive analysis.

thresholds.name: min_total_received
thresholds.rationale: Minimum inbound value. controls deterministic candidate selection or scoring.
thresholds.tuning_guidance: Tune using historical alert review, scenario fixtures, and false-positive analysis.

business_purpose: Identify long-inactive accounts that suddenly resume high-value outbound activity.
detection_logic: Find prior account activity, measure dormant days, then aggregate qualifying outbound reactivation transactions inside the reactivation window.

evidence.description: Prior activity transaction ID establishing observable account history.
Outbound reactivation transaction IDs inside the reactivation window.

example_alert.reason_code: 120 inactive days followed by 10000.00 outbound value within 7 days

example_scenario: An account has no activity for 120 days, then sends 10,000 USD outbound within 7 days.

limitations.limitation: New accounts without observable history should not be treated as dormant by default.
limitations.mitigation: Require prior activity evidence before triggering.
Add customer profile, seasonality, and account-purpose review.

limitations.limitation: Account status and customer profile context should be added later.
limitations.mitigation: Join staged account status and future customer risk features.

operational_notes: Analysts should verify whether the account was closed, dormant, or simply seasonal.
Review account takeover signals when rapid outbound activity appears after dormancy.
reason_code_format: 120 inactive days followed by 10000.00 outbound value within 7 days
scoring_logic: Use the base score unless total outbound amount reaches the configured high-value multiplier, then use the high-value score.

thresholds.name: dormant_days_threshold
thresholds.rationale: Dormancy period. controls deterministic candidate selection or scoring.
thresholds.tuning_guidance: Tune using historical alert review, scenario fixtures, and false-positive analysis.

thresholds.rationale: Reactivation window. controls deterministic candidate selection or scoring.
thresholds.tuning_guidance: Tune using historical alert review, scenario fixtures, and false-positive analysis.

business_purpose: Identify funds returning near the origin through directed transaction cycles.
detection_logic: Construct a directed account transaction graph, detect simple cycles within a configurable hop limit, select transaction evidence, then convert detections into AlertRecord outputs.

evidence.description: Transaction IDs along the directed cycle path.
Canonical directed account path used for analyst review.

example_alert.reason_code: 4-account circular flow with 25000.00 total value over 36.0 hours

example_scenario: Four accounts transfer value around a directed loop and return funds near the origin within 36 hours.

limitations.limitation: Cycle detection over synthetic data may be cleaner than production flow networks.
limitations.mitigation: Backtest against noisy transaction networks before production deployment.

limitations.limitation: Multi-edge transaction evidence may require additional analyst summarisation.
limitations.mitigation: Add graph evidence summaries and rollups in later documentation artefacts.

limitations.limitation: Neo4j graph evidence and community context will be added later.
limitations.mitigation: Integrate graph database paths and community metrics in future tickets.

operational_notes: Review whether cycle participants share customers, devices, or counterparties.
Use detection artefacts to explain cycle path and transaction evidence.
reason_code_format: 4-account circular flow with 25000.00 total value over 36.0 hours
scoring_logic: Use the base score by default, the high-amount score when total cycle value reaches the high-amount threshold, and the long-cycle score when cycle length reaches the long-cycle hop threshold. If multiple elevated conditions apply, use the maximum score.

thresholds.name: max_cycle_hops
thresholds.rationale: Maximum cycle length. controls deterministic candidate selection or scoring.
thresholds.tuning_guidance: Tune using historical alert review, scenario fixtures, and false-positive analysis.

thresholds.name: min_cycle_hops
thresholds.rationale: Minimum cycle length. controls deterministic candidate selection or scoring.
thresholds.tuning_guidance: Tune using historical alert review, scenario fixtures, and false-positive analysis.

thresholds.rationale: Minimum cycle value. controls deterministic candidate selection or scoring.
